content.en:
After that, Ye Tian spent a relatively peaceful period of time. Some chambers of commerce such as the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce did not take action against him for the time being.

Ye Tian did not go out, but practiced and refined the Chonggong Xuanye inside the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

Time passed in a flash, and a relatively long time passed.

This day.

Ye Tian successfully deduced the supreme-level Chonggong technique, and deduced the Wanfa Chonggong to the supreme level.

Immediately, he began to practice the perfected Wanfa Chonggong technique and transformed the Wanfa Chonggong.

In order to quickly complete the transformation, he swallowed a large amount of Chonggong Xuanye, and then reshaped the Wanfa Chonggong.

As time passed, the Wanfa Chonggong quickly completed its reshaping.

Boom! ! ! !

The Wanfa Chonggong transformed from the emperor-level Chonggong to the supreme level, and the mana in the body also completed the transformation, becoming more pure and powerful.

And during this period, he was not only deducing the technique, but also practicing. His current cultivation has reached the eighth level of the eighth heaven.

Now that he has the supreme-level Chonggong technique, his cultivation speed will be faster. It won't be long before he can break through to the ninth heaven.

"The Chonggong technique has been upgraded to the supreme level. I have to create one or two supreme-level Chonggong secrets to bring out my strength!"

Ye Tian murmured.

So in the days that followed, he deduced and created the supreme-level Chonggong secrets. After spending some time, he successfully created it.

Buzz! ! ! !

A set of blood-colored armor gradually condensed on Ye Tian's body. This is his supreme-level Chonggong secret - Extreme Blood Armor!

After that, he continued to deduce. After many Chonggong years, he deduced two supreme-level Chonggong secrets one after another.

These two supreme-level heavy palace secrets are Extreme Blood Blade and Extreme Blood Escape. With these three supreme-level heavy palace secrets, his strength is already amazing.

Moreover, his current cultivation has successfully reached the sixth level of the ninth heaven. His real combat power is already amazing, no less than the strongest person in Zi Lan Mountain.

"The owner of Zi Lan Mountain is a strong man of the thirteenth level and the eighth level. I should have a chance to beat him, but it is not ruled out that Zi Lan Mountain hides a more powerful existence."

Ye Tian murmured.

So, he will not be too high-profile, but he does not need to be afraid of anything.

Even if he encounters a strong man of the fourteenth heaven, he can escape if he cannot beat him.

"Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce is still too weak. With the help of Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, it cannot help me quickly understand this time and space line. It's time to leave Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce!"

Ye Tian murmured.

Immediately, he was ready to say goodbye to Xiao Ya of Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

...

"President Xiao, I'm ready to leave!"

Ye Tian came to Xiao Ya and told her his purpose.

Xiao Ya was a little overwhelmed. She had thought about Ye Tian leaving, but she didn't expect it to be now. It was too sudden and too...Soon.

Over the years, Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce has grown rapidly with the help of Ye Tian, ​​and even recruited several Chonggong secret masters, but she naturally does not want Ye Tian to leave.

Because only Ye Tian can refine the intermediate and high-purity Chonggong Xuanye.

If Ye Tian leaves, the loss to Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce will be too great.

"Secret Master Ye, is there anything wrong with our Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce's hospitality? Why are you leaving?"

Xiao Ya asked.

Ye Tian shook his head, "No, I just want to go to a farther place to have a look!"

"Farther place?"

Xiao Ya knew that Ye Tian was going to leave Zi Lan Mountain, and immediately persuaded him: "Secret Master Ye, if you want to leave Zi Lan Mountain and go to other areas, you must pass through the Tianxuan River. The Tianxuan River is too dangerous. Even the strong men of the ninth heaven are not 100% sure to cross it."

"President Xiao, I have a way to cross the Tianxuan River."

Ye Tian said.

Seeing that Ye Tian was determined to leave, President Xiao stopped persuading him and could only say: "Then Secret Master Ye, be careful!"

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly and left immediately.

Just after Ye Tian left, an old man appeared beside Xiao Ya.

This old man was the ancestor of Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, Xiao He, the third level of the ninth heaven.

"Grandmaster!"

Xiao Ya said respectfully.

"Xiao Ya, Master Ye can't leave. Even if he is threatened, he must stay in Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce. You are still too soft-hearted!" Xiao He said.

"Grandmaster, if we force him to stay, he will not work for us. Moreover, if we offend a powerful Master Chonggong, the future will be a disaster. If he leaves, let him go!" Xiao Ya said.

· ·······Please give flowers····· ·····

"We let him leave, but the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce will not let him leave."

Xiao He said.

"Please help him when the time comes. If it weren't for him, our Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce would have gone bankrupt long ago!" Xiao Ya requested.

"Okay!"

Xiao He agreed.

……

As soon as Ye Tian left the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce, many Chonggong monks set their sights on him.

But he didn't care at all.

Hua Hua Hua! ! ! !

Figures appeared around him, and the surrounding void was transformed.

Then, Heishan and other Chonggong monks appeared.

"Secret Master Ye, are you willing to join our Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce?"

......... .... ...

Heishan walked in front of Ye Tian and asked.

"Get lost!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Looking for death!"

Heishan was extremely angry.

"Kill him!"

Heishan no longer had the idea of ​​winning over Ye Tian, ​​and directly ordered to kill Ye Tian.

But the next moment.

A ray of light passed through the bodies of those heavy palace monks. Whether they were monks of the fifth or seventh heaven, they were like ants in Ye Tian's hands. He waved his hand and all these monks turned into dust.

Heishan wanted to escape, but was grabbed by Ye Tian with one hand and killed directly.

"You are looking for death!!!"

Three monks of the ninth heaven came from three directions. They were the ancestors behind the Black Dragon Chamber of Commerce and other forces.

Suddenly.

A blood blade emerged and instantly killed the three ancestors of the ninth heaven.

"Come out!"

Ye Tian said to the empty void.

Wow!

Xiao He walked out from there, trembling all over.

He didn't expect Ye Tian's strength to be so terrifying. Killing a monk of the ninth heaven was like killing an ant. What kind of cultivation is this?

He wanted to help Ye Tian, ​​but Ye Tian acted too quickly and killed too quickly, so he didn't have a chance to do anything.

"Master Ye, don't misunderstand me. I am Xiao He, the ancestor of Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce. I have no ill will towards you!" Xiao He hurriedly explained.

"I know, so I didn't attack you. Go back and don't follow me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Xiao He ran away quickly.
